health_info.official_diagnoses: IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome) - diagnosed 2019, SIBO (Small Intestinal Bacterial Overgrowth) - diagnosed 2023, Generalized Anxiety Disorder
health_info.health_history: Digestive issues started in college during stressful exam periods. Initially diagnosed wit
main_symptoms_ordered: Food sensitivities - react to many foods
health_info.current_supplements: Probiotic (daily), Digestive enzymes (with meals), Magnesium glycinate 300mg (bedtime)

day_1.breakfast: Smoothie with protein powder and berries
day_1.lunch: Grilled chicken with white rice and cooked vegetables
day_1.dinner: Fish or turkey with safe vegetables

nutrition_preferences.nutrition_struggles: Limited food options due to sensitivities, Fear of eating new foods, Social situations difficult, Losing weight unintentionally
nutrition_preferences.foods_to_avoid: Onions and garlic (major triggers), Beans and lentils (severe bloating), Dairy (digestive issues), Cruciferous vegetables (gas), High FODMAP foods

fitness.weekly_workout_description: Yoga 2x per week, walking 30 minutes daily

digestive_health.digestive_symptoms: Severe bloating, gas, cramping, alternating bowel patterns
digestive_health.bowel_movement_frequency: Varies - sometimes 3x per day, sometimes once every 3 days
digestive_health.menstrual_cycle_description: Cycle Length: 28-30 days, Cycle Regularity: Regular, PMS Symptoms: Digestive symptoms worsen, mood swings, fatigue

lifestyle.daily_routine_struggles: Anxiety keeps me awake, digestive discomfort wakes me up

supplement_preferences.supplement_preference: Open to Supplements: Yes, but cautious due to sensitive stomach

goals.wellness_journey_excitement: What Success Looks Like: Being able to eat at restaurants without fear, going through a day without severe bloating
